title: selaginella dolichoclada
intro: Selaginella dolichoclada is a species of plant in the family Selaginellaceae, commonly known as spikemoss, a type of non-vascular, ancient-looking plant that thrives in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Selaginella dolichoclada include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antioxidant properties, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. In herbal preparations, Selaginella dolichoclada is often used in teas, infusions, and capsules, although proper dosages and preparation methods should be determined by a healthcare professional.
